title: BEM-645 fix codex runner
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
path=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
text=path.read_text(errors='ignore') if path.exists() else ''
# Repair duplicate permissions keys caused by separate `actions: read` line outside permissions block.
lines=text.splitlines()
out=[]
skip_next_actions=False
for i,line in enumerate(lines):
    stripped=line.strip()
    if stripped=='actions: read' and i>0:
        # keep only if previous non-empty parent is permissions; otherwise drop duplicate top-level/actions line
        # In valid file it must be indented under permissions. Duplicate top-level is what breaks YAML.
        if line.startswith('  '):
            out.append(line)
        else:
            continue
    else:
        out.append(line)
new_text=sep.join(out)+sep
# If permissions block still lacks actions: read, insert it under permissions.
if 'permissions:' in new_text and '  actions: read' not in new_text:
    new_text=new_text.replace('permissions:'+sep, 'permissions:'+sep+'  actions: read'+sep, 1)
path.write_text(new_text)
# Basic static validation without yaml dependency: no duplicate top-level actions after permissions block.
final=path.read_text(errors='ignore')
valid=('permissions:' in final and '  contents: write' in final and final.count(sep+'actions: read')==0 and final.count(sep+'  actions: read')>=1)
state={'schema_version':'codex_runner_emergency_repair.v1','bem':'BEM-645','status':'pass' if valid else 'failed','workflow':str(path),'valid_static':valid,'blocker':None if valid else {'code':'CODEX_RUNNER_STATIC_REPAIR_FAILED'},'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:10 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem645_emergency_fix_codex_runner_duplicate_permissions.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem645_emergency_fix_codex_runner_duplicate_permissions.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-645 | Emergency Fix Codex Runner Duplicate Permissions | '+state['status'].upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:10 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Removed duplicate top-level `actions: read` and kept it under `permissions`.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if state['blocker'] is None else json.dumps(state['blocker'],ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem645_emergency_fix_codex_runner_duplicate_permissions','cycle_id':'bem645-emergency-fix-codex-runner-duplicate-permissions','source':'gpt_emergency_repair','status':state['status'],'workflow':str(path),'blocker':state['blocker'],'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:10 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem645_emergency_fix_codex_runner_duplicate_permissions']={'status':state['status'],'workflow':str(path),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':state['blocker']}
contour_state['codex_runner_yaml_status']='repaired_static' if valid else 'repair_failed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:10 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=state['blocker']
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem645_emergency_fix_codex_runner_duplicate_permissions.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-645 '+state['status'].upper()+': codex-runner duplicate actions permission repaired.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(path),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Emergency repaired codex-runner.yml duplicate top-level actions permission')
"""
No issue comments.
